auth.signUp.fields.email.label: Email

auth.signUp.passwordHint: Use at least 8 characters. Your password is encrypted and never stored in plaintext.

auth.forgotPassword.title: Forgot password?
auth.forgotPassword.description: Enter your account email and we'll send a link to set a new password.
auth.forgotPassword.fields.email.label: Email
auth.forgotPassword.sent.title: Check your inbox
auth.forgotPassword.sent.descriptionSuff: we've sent a reset link. It may take a minute; check spam if you don't see it.
auth.resetPassword.title: Set new password
auth.resetPassword.description.missingTo: Use the link from your email to set a new password. If you landed here by mistake, request a new link from the sign-in page.
auth.resetPassword.done.title: Password updated
auth.resetPassword.errors.generic: Something went wrong. Try again or request a new link.
authCta.default.badge: Built from real shipped SaaS codebases
authCta.default.description: Discover proven stacks, architecture choices, and implementation patterns from production open-source products so you can ship faster with less risk.
authCta.default.items.library.title: Curated library of recipes
authCta.default.items.library.descriptio: Learn from high-signal codebases, not random tutorials.
authCta.default.items.guidance.title: AI chef guidance
authCta.default.items.guidance.descripti: Get practical suggestions tailored to your stack and goals.
authCta.default.items.patterns.title: Production-minded patterns
authCta.default.items.patterns.descripti: Use structures and security practices tested in real apps.
authCta.default.footer.title: Join free and start with your next idea in minutes.
authCta.default.footer.copy: No credit card required. Save recipes, compare stacks, and come back to your research anytime.
authCta.forgot.description: Share the email tied to your account and we'll send a password reset link. For security, we only send instructions to verified inboxes.
authCta.forgot.items.emailRecovery.title: Email-based recovery
authCta.forgot.items.emailRecovery.descr: Reset links are sent to the account email to protect access.
authCta.forgot.items.quickTurnaround.des: Most links arrive within a minute. Check spam if needed.
authCta.forgot.items.saferReset.title: Safer reset flow
authCta.forgot.items.saferReset.descript: Recovery requests never reveal whether an email exists.
authCta.forgot.footer.title: Still blocked? You can always request another reset link.
authCta.forgot.footer.copy: Use your most recent email and keep this tab open while you check your inbox.
authCta.reset.description: You're one step away from getting back in. Choose a unique password you don't use elsewhere to keep your account protected.
authCta.reset.items.uniquePassword.title: Use a unique password
authCta.reset.items.uniquePassword.descr: Combine length, symbols, and uniqueness for stronger security.
authCta.reset.items.protectLogins.title: Protect future logins
authCta.reset.items.protectLogins.descri: A fresh password helps lock out stale or leaked credentials.
authCta.reset.items.continueQuickly.desc: Once updated, you'll be redirected and ready to sign in.
authCta.reset.footer.title: Tip: save your password in a trusted password manager.
authCta.reset.footer.copy: That makes future sign-ins faster and significantly reduces lockout risk.
authLayoutFooter.welcomeDescription: Sign in to securely compare stacks, save recipes, and ship with confidence.
cta.description: Explore real codebases, copy battle-tested architecture decisions, and skip weeks of trial and error. Open the app and get cooking.
cta.heading: Ready to cook?
features.header.description: Built for solo developers, student projects, startups, and growing product teams. Learn from real shipped codebases and launch with fewer blind spots.
features.items.analysis.bullets.hotspots: Catch architecture risks before they slow delivery
features.items.analysis.bullets.modules: Map modules, ownership, and complexity quickly
features.items.analysis.description: Understand any repo fast, from student capstones to large production platforms, before you commit implementation time.
features.items.analysis.title: See how real projects are structured
features.items.momentum.bullets.trends: Track stack and tooling trends over time
features.items.momentum.bullets.validate: Validate technical bets with real usage signals
features.items.momentum.description: Use adoption signals from active projects to choose tools that work for solo builders and scaling teams.
features.items.momentum.title: Choose stacks with lasting momentum
features.items.recipes.bullets.workflows: Reuse proven workflows from shipped products
features.items.recipes.description: Study real SaaS repositories and apply production patterns whether you're building alone, learning in school, or shipping with a team.
features.items.recipes.title: Learn from proven SaaS implementations
features.items.security.bullets.auth: Reference secure authentication and access patterns
features.items.security.bullets.billing: Adopt robust billing and subscription flows
features.items.security.description: Skip fragile boilerplate with security-minded implementations trusted by teams across growth stages.
features.items.security.title: Production-grade auth, billing, and security
features.items.surface.bullets.filter: Filter by stack, domain, and project size
features.items.surface.bullets.launch: Find examples ready to adapt and ship
features.items.surface.description: Explore patterns for web apps, APIs, agents, and more across indie projects, student builds, and full product organizations.
features.items.surface.title: Build across every product surface
features.items.typesafe.bullets.typing: Follow strict typing patterns that scale
features.items.typesafe.description: Use TypeScript-first patterns that help students learn faster and help teams ship safer with fewer regressions.
features.items.typesafe.title: Stay type-safe from first commit to scale
hero.description.primary: Eat the boilerplate. A platform of proven cookbooks from real kitchens ― plus an AI assistant built from experience.
hero.description.secondary: Secret sauce: proven patterns from teams that ship.
howItWorks.description: The recipes are a curated intelligence layer for learning from real products and applying those lessons to your own.
howItWorks.heading: How teams ship faster with saas.recipes
howItWorks.items.insights.description: Compare tooling, complexity, and maintenance signals so you can choose patterns that fit your product constraints.
howItWorks.items.insights.highlights.fil: Filter examples by stack and product type
howItWorks.items.insights.title: Actionable insights for your stack
howItWorks.items.launch.description: Reuse battle-tested approaches instead of rebuilding foundations, and focus your team on product differentiation.
howItWorks.items.launch.title: Faster path from idea to launch
howItWorks.items.patterns.description: Browse production-grade repositories and see how real teams structure auth, billing, dashboards, and release workflows.
howItWorks.items.patterns.title: Curated implementation patterns
landingFooter.description: Discover battle-tested open source SaaS projects, compare their stacks, workflows, and AI setup. Ship faster with implementation patterns you can trust.

themeCustomizer.description: Customize the theme and layout of your dashboard.

testimonials.description: Solo developers and product teams use SaaS Recipes to launch faster and avoid reinventing the wheel.
testimonials.heading: Built for All Kitchens
testimonials.items.first.author: Engineering lead
testimonials.items.first.quote: Finally, a reference that shows how real SaaS apps are built, not just theories. Cut our setup time in half.
testimonials.items.second.author: Full-stack developer
testimonials.items.second.quote: The dashboard and auth patterns were exactly what we needed. We shipped our MVP in weeks, not months.
